lines.speaker: Shamus
lines.text: Ay yer big elephant! Yer've caught me, to be sure! What would an elephant like yer be wanting wid ol' Shamus then?

lines.speaker: Shamus
lines.text: Well you'll have to be catchin' me again when yer are, elephant!

sections.title: Trying to chop down his tree after finding him

lines.speaker: Shamus
lines.text: Hey! Yer big elephant! Don't go choppin' down me house, now!
